creator: dimitris@michelinakis.gr
text:
I'd like to report that the slow receive on 3Com cards still exists in 4.7-R.

The speed seems to improve when i LOWER the receive buffers, but it does
not seem to eliminate it completely.

I'm using a 3Com 3c905-TX Fast Etherlink XL PCI card, which is connected
to a Netgear Switch (100mbit full duplex).

-- 
Dimitris 'sehh' Michelinakis
